message.content:
@startuml
autonumber
left to right direction
skinparam sequenceMessageSize 100

participant GameController
participant Player
participant Die

GameController -> GameController : 1 Start
GameController -> Player : 2 Create
Player -> Die : 3 Create

loop [PlayerMoney<3000]
  Player -> Die : 4 Roll
end

Player -> GameController : 5 Win Message

@enduml
